gmail_auth_expired.problem: Gmail account authentication expired after iOS update
steps: Look for Gmail account with warning triangle
Return to Mail app and pull down to refresh
Verify with customer their work email server is running
Try toggling Mail sync off and on
If still failing, delete and re-add the account
Contact IT department if server settings needed

common_scam_signs: Requests for passwords or personal information
Suspicious sender addresses not matching claimed company
Generic greetings ('Dear Customer' instead of actual name)
how_to_handle: Never click links in suspicious emails
Don't reply or provide any information
Mark as junk in Mail app
Block the sender if option available
